title: Mega Man X

environment: a ruined elevated highway at dusk with broken road slabs, warning lights, and a burning skyline

composition: single android only, one broken highway path, one clear horizon, and sharp industrial contrast

legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Adventure game.

A compact armored android with an arm-mounted blaster in a ruined elevated highway at dusk with broken road slabs, warning lights, and a burning skyline, standing ready before a charge into the collapsing route ahead.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- urgent, heroic, mechanical

Composition:
- single android only, one broken highway path, one clear horizon, and sharp industrial contrast
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mega Man X armor likeness, avoid exact helmet fins, avoid official blaster design, avoid sigma-like villain silhouettes, avoid resemblance to mega man

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
